creator: elij+freebsd@wundrd.net
text:
From https://golang.org/doc/devel/release.html#go1.9

> go1.9.3 (released 2018/01/22) includes fixes to the compiler, runtime, and the
> database/sql, math/big, net/http, and net/url packages. See the Go 1.9.3 milestone
> on our issue tracker for details.

Link to milestone: https://github.com/golang/go/issues?q=milestone%3AGo1.9.3
